title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Cartoon flat illustration, bright warm color palette, humorous and fun, social media science article style, non-photorealistic, trendy internet vibe. Scene: A cute cartoon checklist clipboard with 5 checkboxes, each checkbox next to a fun little icon: 1) Checkbox next to a tiny list + camera icon (text: '列3个以上B-Roll镜头'), 2) Checkbox next to a stack of film clips icon (text: '多拍2倍素材'), 3) Checkbox next to three camera angles icon (text: '拍三个角度'), 4) Checkbox next to a 15s timer icon (text: '10-15秒一切'), 5) Checkbox next to a tiny sound wave icon (text: '留环境音'). Big bold Chinese title at top: '新手B-Roll急救包 Checklist'. All checkboxes are empty, friendly rounded design. 16:9 aspect ratio, clean light cream background, warm green and orange accent colors, cute and playful, no realistic details.
